category_sources: source_facts.description says user-mode networking for unprivileged network namespaces; official README uses the same description and explains unprivileged namespace networking.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading and source_facts.name both use slirp4netns.
docs_sources: Official README contains quick start and links the official manual page slirp4netns.1.md.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/rootless-containers/slirp4netns, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes user-mode networking for unprivileged network namespaces, use by container engines, and rootless/container namespace integrations.
